tagline: Step inside the hundred-inch screen of isolation.
liner: This gritty East Coast boom bap track runs at roughly one zero eight beats per minute, featuring dusty drums with hard snare cracks and a foghorn bass line mimicking an upright stab. Layered over a dark A minor piano loop and muted trumpet, it creates a sinister yet rubber-hose animated vibe reminiscent of black-and-white nineteen twenties dockside cartoons. The song portrays a wealthy but socially isolated figure who aggressively rejects outsiders despite their admiration for his lifestyle.
worldCaption: A foghorn bass line cuts through the static of a hundred-inch TV in this noir-docked world where only Big G plays.

bios.lead: Projects arrogant disdain with raspy street vocals.
bios.back: Echoes every rejection into the hollow void behind.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.
bios.perc: Adds rhythmic texture to the dusty sonic landscape.
bios.bass: Provides foghorn stabs that mimic upright bass hits.
bios.synth: Weaves dark atmosphere around the piano loop core.
bios.other: Layers muted trumpet into the sinister animated vibe.
